name: Oatmeal Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream together the shortening, sugar, and eggs until well combined.
2. Cook the raisins in water until tender. Drain them before use.
3. Add the salt, cinnamon, flour, and baking soda to the creamed mixture.
4. Fold in the oatmeal and raisins.
5. Drop spoonfuls of the dough onto a greased cookie sheet.
6. Bake at 375°F (190°C) until the cookies are done.
